sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try 1 UP at pos 3 to reach state 1 (match)
action(['UP'])

# Check if level completed
print("Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
print("Done?", last_action_result.get('done', False))
print("Reward?", last_action_result.get('reward', None))

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
top_hashes = set()
initial_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
for n in initial_seg['nodes']:
    boundary = n['boundary']
    if boundary:
        avg_row = sum(p[0] for p in boundary) / len(boundary)
    else:
        avg_row = 0
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] > 5 and avg_row < 30:
        top_hashes.add(n['hash'])

print("\nPink symbols:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        avg_row = sum(p[0] for p in boundary) / len(boundary)
        avg_col = sum(p[1] for p in boundary) / len(boundary)
        if 50 < avg_row < 58:
            is_match = n['hash'] in top_hashes
            pos = int(round((avg_col - 15) / 7))
            print(f"  pos {pos}: hash={n['hash'][:12]}..., match={is_match}")

# Also check sky blue bar
print("\nSky blue symbols:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        avg_row = sum(p[0] for p in boundary) / len(boundary)
        avg_col = sum(p[1] for p in boundary) / len(boundary)
        if 40 < avg_row < 46:
            is_match = n['hash'] in top_hashes
            pos = int(round((avg_col - 15) / 7))
            print(f"  pos {pos}: hash={n['hash'][:12]}..., match={is_match}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
